scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with multiple Element children and cached shadowChildrenRef throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
scenarios.precondition: parent with three Element children and cache populated by a prior child(0) call
pseudocode: TEST TC10 child negative-index after cache

scenarios.description: child(index) after appendChild invalidates cache and returns newly added child
scenarios.precondition: parent with two Element children and cache populated by a prior child(0) call
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the newly appended third Element
pseudocode: TEST TC11 cache invalidation on mutation
parent.child(0); // build and cache child list
